title: LocknLock Eco Ovenglass Glass Food Storage Containers with Lids 650ml - Airtight, Leakproof Round Glass Food Container with Recycled Plastic Lid, Oven Safe, Dishwasher Safe, Diameter 15.5 x 7.5cm
features: WATER & AIRTIGHT - All 4 sides of these food container with lids lock for an airtight seal. This means to spills whether that be in your fridge, freezer or if you need your meal prep on the go

RECYCLED LIDS - Eco Ovenglass products are all topped with LocknLock's iconic Eco lids made from left over production plastic to ensure nothing is wasted. Lid colours may vary as no two pieces are the same

RECYCLABLE BOROSILICATE GLASS - These food containers are made from tough borosilicate glass that is even more shatterproof than tempered glass. This is to ensure this glass ovenware really does last a lifetime

DISHWASHER SAFE - As well as being dishwasher safe, LocknLock Eco ovenglass products are microwave & freezer safe too. An all-round sustainable and stylish product that is practical to match. They're also BPA Free

OVEN SAFE EXTREME RESILIENCE - Turn up the heat with these glass food storage containers. Eco Ovenglass is resistant to extremely high oven temperatures, withstanding anything up to 400°C (glass dish only) so you can cook and store your culinary creations in the same dish
description: From the manufacturer LocknLock Oven Glass - For Oven Cooking An ideal range of oven glass containers allowing you to cook your favourite meals or desserts and store them in the same dish. The LocknLock silicone seal and locking mechanism means that your favourite dishes can be created and stored before eating and yet still remain as delicious and fresh as the second they were made. Oven safe up to 400°C Microwave safe Fridge and freezer safe Easy to use and clean BPA free All size and Shape Square, rectangle, round, with a flat or dome lid, our containers cover all you needs. Multipurpose Containers Use our containers to store and cook your favourite food, hot or cold, sweet or savory. Heat Resistant Glass Ultra secure heat resistant glass allowing you to cook your dishes straight in the oven.
